entities.name: CONSERVATION AGRICULTURE
entities.description: A cost-effective alternative to conventional tillage used to manage weed dynamics and productivity

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL TILLAGE
entities.description: Traditional tillage practice used as a baseline for comparison

entities.name: RICE-WHEAT SYSTEM
entities.description: A cropping system consisting of rice and wheat crops

entities.name: FLOODED IRRIGATION
entities.description: A traditional irrigation method used in rice-wheat systems

entities.name: SUBSURFACE DRIP IRRIGATION
entities.description: An irrigation method layered with conservation agriculture to reduce weeds and increase productivity

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A primary cereal crop in the studied system

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A primary cereal crop in the studied system

entities.name: WEED DENSITY
entities.description: The number of weeds per unit area in the field

entities.name: ZERO TILLAGE DIRECT SEEDED RICE
entities.description: A rice planting method that avoids tillage

entities.name: RESIDUE
entities.description: The presence or absence of crop residue on the soil surface

entities.name: PUDDLED TRANSPLANTED RICE
entities.description: A traditional rice planting method involving puddling and transplanting

entities.name: DRY MATTER
entities.description: The mass of weed biomass per unit area

entities.name: RICE YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the rice crop measured in Mg ha-1

entities.name: PHALARIS MINOR
entities.description: A specific weed species affecting wheat

entities.name: CORONOPUS DIDYMUS
entities.description: A specific weed species affecting wheat

entities.name: MELILOTUS INDICA
entities.description: A specific weed species affecting wheat

entities.name: WEED INDEX
entities.description: A measure used to evaluate the impact of weeds on crop growth

entities.name: DIVERSITY INDICES
entities.description: Measures of weed species diversity including H’, R, and E

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The overall yield and output of the rice-wheat system

entities.name: WEED FREE
entities.description: A field condition where all weeds are removed

entities.name: WEEDY CHECK
entities.description: A field condition where weeds are allowed to grow naturally

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: An approach to improve productivity while maintaining ecological sustainability
